description_original: she is a loving and friendly pet....she is more of a protective dog
description_rewritten: Kutty is a medium-sized, five-month-old female dog with short black fur. She is a healthy mixed-breed and has been sterilized. Kutty is a loving and friendly dog who can also be protective. She would thrive in a patient and understanding home where she can feel safe and secure.

description_original: Found them at my place..juz need adopter because im at training center
description_rewritten: Wolf,batman,sally is a small, black, Domestic Short Hair kitten, approximately 2 months old. This mixed-gender kitten was found at a training center and is now seeking a loving adopter. Wolf,batman,sally is currently unvaccinated and unsterilized, but is otherwise healthy. A quiet home would be ideal for this little one.

description_original: Mr Zorro is an ultra friendly, silly, playful dog who can mix well with other dogs of all sizes and temperament.He was found wandering on the street, in poor condition. Now he is a healthy puppy, clever, smart, active,growing, looking for a good home. For serious adopters only.
description_rewritten: Mr. Zorro is a medium-sized, six-month-old male dog with short black fur. This playful, mixed-breed puppy is healthy and fully vaccinated and sterilized. He was found wandering and is now a clever and active companion, enjoying the company of other dogs. Mr. Zorro is looking for a good home where he can continue to grow and thrive.

description_original: Tara is a rescue cat and is now ready for adoption. Very affectionate Note that the adoption fee is simply to cover the cost of spaying. Urgent as Fosterer is relocating.
description_rewritten: Tara is a medium-sized, black Domestic Short Hair cat, 18 months old. This affectionate female is fully vaccinated and sterilized and currently in good health. Tara was a rescue and is now seeking a loving forever home. Her fosterer is relocating, making her adoption urgent.

description_original: She was adopted from a friend. She can adapt to new environment easily. We love her so much but due to certain circumstances, we no longer can keep her and wish that she will find a new owner who will love and take care of her. She is a good guard dog, independent, toilet trained and well-behaved. She sleeps in a cage at night. She is most happy to have her daily walk.
description_rewritten: Pao Yee is a 30-month-old female, medium-sized, black, short-haired mixed-breed dog. She is fully vaccinated and sterilized and currently living a healthy life. Pao Yee was adopted from a friend and is known to adapt easily to new environments. This independent dog is toilet-trained and well-behaved, and enjoys daily walks. She sleeps in a cage at night. We are searching for a loving owner who will provide her with the care she deserves.

description_original: Hi all, I have 2 male cats up for adoption. Very manja and mendengar kata. Soothy is the fully black. Salem is the black and white color. Too many cats at my moms house thus I have to let them go for a good owner. P/s : Make sure you are contactable if I want to visit them at anytime. No fees needed just give me cats food will do. Thank you.
description_rewritten: Soothy and Salem are two male, six-month-old Domestic Short Hair cats. Soothy is entirely black, while Salem has black and white coloring. Both cats are healthy and fully vaccinated and sterilized. They are looking for a loving home to share with you. Please ensure you are reachable for potential visits.

description_original: These four fursiblings were originally from a pack of five but one pup died after being hit by a car. They were rescued at a month plus and currently being fostered by a kind lady who owns another couple of rescued dogs. They will make good guard dogs and their barks even made the fosterer's two grown dogs retreated a few steps. Kiki is the biggest of them four and he is the laid-back brother he can fall asleep anywhere and anytime even when his head was on top of the tap. Eat and sleep is Kiki's motto. However when challenged, Kiki will step up and protect his sisters and stand in front and bark. Lala is a feisty one she barks the loudest yet she is a softie inside. Her ears are the most unique pointy to the sides unlike her siblings and she loves any kind of food you serve her. Wawa is the prettiest and smallest in size but she gives you a good fight and will be good in guarding your house with her high pitched bark. Wawa looks the most different from all of them and her coat is similar to a Doberman. Yaya is the most animated and active of them all. She is keen to explore and the first to warm up to humans after they were rescued. Yaya is the most intelligent of them all as she picks up cue faster than her siblings. To prevent more strays please neuter and spay your pups once they are six months old. FOR SERIOUS ADOPTERS ONLY. Please provide them with a loving home with minimal caging and adequate attention and care. A dog's loyalty is for life. An adoption fee of RM will be required for spaying and neutering to prevent them to have babies in future. We do not want those puppies to end up in street again. Please contact Sue Tiong at for further enquiries and more details about adoption.
description_rewritten: Kiki Lala Yaya Wawa is a medium-sized, black, short-haired mixed-breed dog, two months old. This playful quartet was originally part of a litter of five, and one sibling was sadly lost to a traffic accident. Currently fostered, Kiki is the largest of the group and enjoys relaxing, while Lala is feisty and vocal, and Yaya is the most active and intelligent. Wawa, the smallest, has a distinctive coat resembling a Doberman and possesses a high-pitched bark. All four pups are fully vaccinated and sterilized. They are seeking a loving home where their playful personalities and protective instincts can thrive.

description_original: Toby was found at a food stall and took "him" home, well we thought it was a "him". While at the vet's you can imagine the surprise when we were told "he" was a she. She kept the name Toby because she liked it and always comes to you when you call her name. She is an independent girl who loves to watch you cook. She likes to do her own thing sometimes but at other times she loves to have her head and chin scratched. Oh and she loves Keropok and lets you know it. She is good with other cats. Toby is also an indoor and outdoor cat. She likes to take her little strolls around the yard and bathe in the sun just as much as on the staircase or by the TV or on a chair. Right now I'm in the middle of moving to United States. So if you are in Klang Valley, I am willing to bring Toby to your place. If you are interested, Whatsapp me...
description_rewritten: Toby is a 48-month-old female Domestic Short Hair cat with a yellow coat and a medium size. Her fur is short and she is fully vaccinated and sterilized. Toby is a healthy cat who enjoys being an independent companion. She often comes to you when you call her name and likes to watch you cook. Toby enjoys scratching and is good with other cats. She is both an indoor and outdoor cat, often taking strolls around the yard and basking in the sun.
